_comment: Per-campaign cycle goals (to ballot drop 2026-07-21). Edit values as they're finalized. Monthly/weekly derive from total unless an override is set.

_schema.doors_weekly_override: Optional explicit weekly target; null = monthly/4 derived
_schema.doors_monthly_override: Optional explicit monthly target; null = total / months_remaining derived
_schema.phones_weekly_override: Optional explicit weekly target; null = monthly/4 derived
_schema.phones_monthly_override: Optional explicit monthly target; null = total / months_remaining derived
